/usr/bin/clang++ -g -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/image_processor.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/application.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/bmp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/factory.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/matrix.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/parse.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/pipeline.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/core/utils.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/base_filter.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/crop.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/edge_detection.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/gaussian_blur.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/grayscale.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/negative.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/sharpening.o CMakeFiles/image_processor.dir/src/filters/compress.o -o image_processor
